content.en:
The Supreme Dao Ancestors and the Invincible Dao Ancestors didn't know the Eternal Source Stone Statue at all, and they flew over one by one to take away the Eternal Source Stone Statue, and after finding that they couldn't take it, they were also ready to use the Eternal Source Stone Statue to participate in enlightenment and cultivation.

At this time, the Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors who belonged to the Three Nine Heavens Forces, the Black Wind Mountain, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace were reminded by the Half-Step Domain Ancestor Transmission that they were not close to cultivation, but those Supreme Dao Ancestors, Invincible Dao Ancestors, or Scattered Cultivators of the Eight Heavens did not know the situation, so they became enlightened by the side of the Eternal Source Stone Statue.

Abrupt.

A scattered cultivator supreme Dao Ancestor's aura declined rapidly, and he actually fell silently and died.

And this was just the beginning, soon, one by one, the strongest Dao Ancestors fell, and almost instantly, seven or eight Supreme Dao Ancestors fell, and even the invincible Dao Ancestors were seriously injured and dying one by one.

"Retreat!"

The Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor, who didn't understand the situation, finally understood, and quickly retreated one by one, not daring to comprehend here.

"Damn, the Half-Step Domain Ancestors must have understood the situation, and they only told their people, not us!"

Some Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors were very annoyed, they were fortunate that their enlightenment was slow, otherwise they might be among the people who fell.

At this time, Ye Tian also came here, and he was reminded by the Eternal Dao Ancestor for the first time.

"Eternal Source Stone Statue!"

Ye Tian also heard of this thing for the first time, when the Eternal Source Stone was only secondary, the main thing was that the statue was not simple, and he couldn't even get close to Shenwu, otherwise even the half-step domain ancestor would be injured.

However, the Eternal Dao Ancestor also said that the Eternal Source Stone Statue contained a very powerful forbidden avenue, and if they continued to comprehend, it would be very helpful to their cultivation.

Moreover, this is already the last world, and basically all the good things have been collected.

And they couldn't help the corpse of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, so it wasn't a waste of time to meditate here.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged away from the Eternal Source Stone Statue and began to comprehend.

Rumble!!!!

The Eternal Source Stone statue presents a picture, which is a terrifying giant ape fighting in the dark forbidden area, easily killing a forbidden creature, which is simply powerful and terrifying.

Every move is natural, and there is infinite mystery.

Due to the distance, the pressure brought to Ye Tian was not too great, and he could barely withstand it.

This kind of enlightenment is equivalent to witnessing a supreme being reveal his forbidden path, and it is enough to benefit a lot from witnessing a little insight into fighting the enemy.

"What level of existence is this giant ape, it's too powerful, isn't it possible that the forbidden creature is not the most powerful existence in the Dark Forbidden Domain?"

Ye Tian wondered.

Ye Tian wanted to ask Ouyang Jiu'er, but after carefully probing around, he didn't find Ouyang Jiu'er's existence.

Since entering the inner world of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, he has not seen Ouyang Jiu'er, it seems that Ouyang Jiu'er is afraid that his identity will be discovered by the half-step domain ancestors, so he has always kept a low profile, and he now knows where Ouyang Jiu'er is.

However, with his understanding of Ouyang Jiu'er, Ouyang Jiu'er must have come in.

Keep up the enlightenment!

As time passed, Ye Tian's perception of the Forbidden Dao became deeper and deeper, and through the picture of the supreme existence fighting, he gradually gained a deep understanding of the Forbidden Dao Technique, and knew the direction of creating the Forbidden Dao Technique.

If he was allowed to create a forbidden Dao technique again, it would definitely not take him too long.

Moreover, the more he comprehended, the more he was able to perceive the horror of that giant ape.

In the blink of an eye, a month has passed.

On this day, the entire world of gold trembled and shook violently.

It's not just the Golden World that is shaking, but the entire body of the Darkwing Roc Eagle is shaking.

"What's going on?"

Many Dao Ancestors panicked.

"All out!"

The half-step domain ancestors spoke one after another.

Whoa!!!

The Half-Step Domain Ancestor was the first to leave the Golden World, and shuttled all the way, and soon left the Inner World of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle and returned to the outside world.

The strongest Dao Ancestors and the Invincible Dao Ancestors also went out quickly, after all, when they came in, they still needed to grope for the worlds to enter, but when they went out and knew the route, they would naturally be much faster.

After a while, all the Dao Ancestors came out, and the Dao Ancestors who didn't come out basically fell.

At this time, Ye Tian also sensed Ouyang Jiu'er's existence.

In addition, before coming out, Ye Tian's copy body was finally able to be used again, so he copied his body, and his ontological identity was transformed into the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, and the copy body replaced the Dark King.

Ye Tian had just come out, and he didn't have time to communicate with Ouyang Jiu'er.

At this moment, everyone's eyes were fixed on a few people.

Those people were very unfamiliar, but they were definitely half-step domain ancestors.

I saw that they were constantly attacking the Darkwing Roc Eagle, strictly speaking attacking the scales, as if they wanted to knock the scales off the Darkwing Roc Eagle's body.

After all, with the strength of the forbidden creatures, a body scale is also an absolute treasure, just refine it, it is a top forbidden weapon!

There were a total of three strange half-step domain ancestors who appeared this time, and one of them seemed to be stronger than the Qinglong Palace Master, and he was holding a top-level forbidden weapon-level sword and constantly slashing the scales of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, causing the body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle to continue to vibrate.

"It turned out to be the Golden Crow Palace Lord of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, I didn't expect you to be dead!"

After the Eternal Dao Ancestor came out, he looked at the sword-wielding half-step Domain Ancestor and spoke.

This opening directly indicated the identity of the three half-step domain ancestors, who were the half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Previously, the Heavenly Emperor Palace had already exposed four half-step domain ancestors, if you added these three, it would be seven half-step domain ancestors!

How terrifying is such strength!

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, are you provoking me?"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord stopped and said in a cold voice.

As the strongest palace master under the command of the Heavenly Emperor Palace of the Hao Sea Realm in the vast sea realm, the status of the Golden Crow Palace Lord is still above the Qinglong Palace Lord, but in the battle of the domain realm, it is rumored that he fell and died, and it is the turn of the Qinglong Palace Lord to take charge of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

But now, the Golden Crow Palace Lord has appeared, confirming that he has not fallen at all.

Whoa!!!

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord, the White Tiger Palace Lord, the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, and the True Martial Palace Lord all appeared beside the Golden Crow Palace Lord one by one, and the Seven Palace Masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace stared at the three half-step domain ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain, and the atmosphere was very solid.

Eternal Dao Ancestor said again: "Your Heavenly Emperor Palace wants to decompose the corpse of this forbidden creature, let's find a way to decompose it together, and then divide it equally?"

However, the Golden Crow Palace Lord threatened in a cold voice: "It's not good to divide it evenly, the corpse of this forbidden creature belongs to our Heavenly Emperor Palace, who dares to disobey it? Eternal Dao Ancestor, if you dare to disobey, I will kill you, you should know that I have this strength!"

Just now, he had already learned about the Eternal Source Stone Statue from the mouth of the Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace, so he was even more greedy for this forbidden creature corpse.

Now, seven palace masters have appeared in the Heavenly Emperor's Palace, and with his combat power, there should be hope to occupy the corpse of this forbidden creature.
